title: Pawel's Weaponry
description: A vanilla+ equipment mod featuring 9 weapons, each with it's own gimmick and some other items.
body:
## A vanilla+ weapons mod featuring 9 weapons, each with it's own gimmick.

![A player holding a netherite longsword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1e3ecb299c99400fd8cf651e3e69a9c62042d4e.png)

### **The current weapons include:**
- A two-handed hammer with a slam ability
- A spear with increased range
- Dual Blades with buffs when dual wielding
- A katana with a damaging dash
- A cleaver that applies an anti-healing effect
- A battleaxe that does more damage on critical hits
- A two-handed longsword with the ability to block a hit
- A twinblade that gets stronger and faster with each hit
- A dagger with high attack speed and a custom enchantment that applies toxin
- A heavy crossbow thats stronger but slower, and can have power applied to it.

There are 2 armor sets, a juggernaut and berserker one, that give bonus stats at the cost of others. (Models and textures W.I.P)

There is a Whip that lets you instantly pull an enemy closer to you

There are also 2 shields:
- The Tower Shield that gives armor when held but slows you down, and has a higher cooldown in exchange for higher durability
- The Buckler that blocks half the damage but cannot be disabled by enemies. It will go on cooldown if held up for too long continously
  
  (All shields are now enchantable in the enchanting table and have a new enchant that rewards you for timing your block)
  
Each weapon has its own advancement for getting the netherite variant as well as in game tooltips.


Now with Better Combat compatibility.
